nasb.text: with all the Arabah across the Jordan to the east, even as far as the sea of the Arabah, at the foot of the slopes of Pisgah.

esv.text: together with all the Arabah on the east side of the Jordan as far as the Sea of the Arabah, under the slopes of Pisgah.

cnv.text: 還有約旦河東的亞拉巴全地，直到亞拉巴海，就是毘斯迦的山坡下。

ccb.text: 包括约旦河东的整个亚拉巴，远至毗斯迦山脚的亚拉巴海。
